HRES 145 EH
H. Res. 145
In the House of Representatives, U. S.,
May 9, 1991.
  Resolved, That the following named Members be, and they are hereby,
  elected to the following standing committees of the House of Representatives:
  COMMITTEE ON INTERIOR AND INSULAR AFFAIRS: George Miller, California,
  Chairman Provided, That the provision in House Resolution 43 relating to
  the exercise of the powers and duties of the chairman by the vice chairman
  of the Committee on Interior and Insular Affairs shall no longer be of
  any force and effect.
  COMMITTEE ON POST OFFICE AND CIVIL SERVICE: Barbara-Rose Collins, Michigan.
Attest:
Clerk.
